stem:
The majority of plastics today wind up in landfills or are, at best, recycled into materials that have a very limited range of applications. To address this problem, chemist Guoliang Liu and colleagues designed a reactor that melts polyethylene and polypropylene—two widely used plastics—into a wax. The wax can then be transformed into a surfactant _(a chemical compound usable as a detergent)_. With this promising new method, plastic waste could be turned into a range of useful cleaning products.

Which choice best states the function of the underlined portion of the text?
choices: It clarifies the meaning of a scientific term.
It explains the significance of a scientific discovery.
It identifies a result that confused the team.
answer: It clarifies the meaning of a scientific term.
explanation: Set off in parentheses, the underlined phrase simply defines “surfactant” as a compound that can be used as a detergent. It doesn’t itself raise an environmental concern, explain why the discovery matters, or mention any confusion on the team.
